scripts.dist:win:ia32: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis --ia32 --publish never
scripts.dist:mac:arm64: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg zip --arm64 --publish never
scripts.release:win:ia32: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --win nsis --ia32 --publish always
scripts.release:mac:arm64: npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --mac dmg zip --arm64 --publish always
